ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "trans_code" TEXT /* Code for the transportation request (e.g., DP0001) */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type used for the trip */,
  "dist_seq" TEXT /* Sequence of distribution locations */,
  "distribute_lea_tm" TEXT /* Time when the trip started */,
  "distribute_arr_tm" TEXT /* Time when the trip ended */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Total distance traveled during the trip */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who completed the trip */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of the trip (e.g., delivery, pickup) */,
  "manifest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manifest for the trip */,
  "fuel_used" REAL /* Amount of fuel used during the trip */,
  "toll_cost" REAL /* Cost of tolls for the trip */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost incurred during the trip */,
  "real_time_updates" INTEGER /* Indicates if real-time updates are enabled for the trip */,
  "route_optimization" INTEGER /* Indicates if route optimization was used for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_manifest_id FOREIGN KEY ("manifest_id") REFERENCES manifests ("manifest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which maintenance is required */,
  "emission_class" TEXT /* Emission class of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the cost is associated with */,
  "trans_cost" REAL /* Cost of transportation (e.g., fuel, tolls) */,
  "charge_cost" REAL /* Cost of loading/unloading */,
  "wait_cost" REAL /* Cost of waiting time */,
  "fixed_use_cost" REAL /* Fixed cost of using the vehicle */,
  "toll_cost" REAL /* Cost of tolls */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost incurred during the trip */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Insurance cost for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the route is associated with */,
  "route_seq" TEXT /* Sequence of locations in the route */,
  "route_distance" INTEGER /* Total distance of the route */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for the route */,
  "real_time_traffic_updates" INTEGER /* Indicates if real-time traffic updates were used for the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type the driver is qualified to drive */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the driver */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the driver's last training */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the driver based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manifests" (
  "manifest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manifest */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the manifest is associated with */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the manifest document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manifest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manifest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manifests_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, driver, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the update is associated with */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_updates_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the collaboration is associated with */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., route optimization, cost adjustment) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the action was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES security ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
